ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Official name of the team */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the team belongs to */,
  "record" TEXT /* Current season record of the team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record update */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conference ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the metrics */,
  "barthag" REAL /* Bart Torvik's Team Quality Metric */,
  "adj_o" REAL /* Adjusted offensive efficiency */,
  "adj_o_rk" INTEGER /* Rank of adjusted offensive efficiency */,
  "adj_d" REAL /* Adjusted defensive efficiency */,
  "adj_d_rk" INTEGER /* Rank of adjusted defensive efficiency */,
  "adj_tempo" REAL /* Adjusted tempo of the team */,
  "adj_tempo_rk" INTEGER /* Rank of adjusted tempo */,
  "pace" REAL /* Average number of possessions per 40 minutes */,
  "eFG" REAL /* Effective Field Goal Percentage */,
  "TOV_pct" REAL /* Turnover percentage */,
  "ORB_pct" REAL /* Offensive rebound percentage */,
  "FT_rate" REAL /* Free throw rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the projection */,
  "proj_record" TEXT /* Projected overall record of the team */,
  "proj_conf_record" TEXT /* Projected conference record of the team */,
  "proj_championship_prob" REAL /* Projected probability of winning the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wab" (
  "wab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WAB entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the WAB metric */,
  "wab" REAL /* Wins above replacement value for the team */,
  "wab_rk" INTEGER /* Rank of the WAB value */,
  "pace_adj_WAB" REAL /* Wins above replacement adjusted for pace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wab_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data upload) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team playing the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the statistic */,
  "FG_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "3P_pct" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "FT_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Average assists per game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Average turnovers per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "points" REAL /* Average points per game */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "FG_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "3P_pct" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "FT_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
